cards.front: What is the SQL command used to insert null values into an employee table?
cards.back: INSERT INTO employee SET column1 = NULL, column2 = NULL, ...

cards.front: How does SQL handle null values when performing calculations?
cards.back: If a null value is used in a calculation, it will be treated as zero.

cards.front: What is the purpose of using the DEFAULT keyword when inserting null values?
cards.back: It specifies the default value to use when a null value is inserted.

cards.front: Can you insert null values into a column that is declared as NOT NULL?
cards.back: No, you cannot directly insert null values into a column that is declared as NOT NULL.

cards.front: How do you verify the result of inserting null values into an employee table?
cards.back: You can use SELECT * FROM employee TO view the new rows with null values.
